title: Complete simulation debug toggle API
description: The inherited debug test imports enable_debug, disable_debug, and is_debug_enabled and expects Simulation._debug_enabled, but simulation.py provides none. Implement the documented module-level toggle plus Simulation instance enable_debug/disable_debug methods and initialize the per-instance flag. Preserve existing logger.debug behavior and add no unrelated logging framework.
close_reason: Implemented module and instance debug toggles; corrected inherited test airtime and global-state isolation; debug tests pass without warnings.
